rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER PORTER ET AL VS. VINCENT J. DENO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Allowing Out-Of-State Attorney To Appear Pro Hac Vice; Memorandum Or Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Christopher J. Wazink For Permission To Appear Pro Hac Vice
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 4, 2024 line 1. DEFENDANT 1945 FRANKLIN STREET, LLC, RICHARD JANKOV AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER ALLOWING OUT-OF-STATE ATTORNEY TO APPEAR PRO HAC VICE; MEMORANDUM OR POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION OF CHRISTOPHER J. WAZINK FOR PERMISSION TO APPEAR PRO HAC VICE is OFF CALENDAR. Application is not served in compliance with CRC 9.40(c)(1). =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: PIK WAH LEE FUNG ET AL VS. LINDA LOW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 4, 2024 line 3. DEFENDANT LINDA LOW MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is DENIED. Moving party failed to carry its burden under CCP 473(b). The Court notes that there is no declaration from the "responsible party of Craw Station" attesting to the facts supporting Defendant's "thought" that Craw Station would respond on defendant's behalf; providing admissible evidence for the reasons counsel was not timely retained; providing admissible evidence that Craw Station "since" retained counsel to represent the Defendant in her individual capacity. The Court further notes that the absence of this declaration was pointed out in opposition filed on March 6, 2024. Defendant filed no reply. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ROGER STERN VS. LENA GIKKAS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 4, 2024 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT ROGER STERN DEMURRER TO AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Memorandum of Points and authorities is 25-pages long. No order allowing an oversized brief on file. Therefore, Memorandum of Points and Authorities is stricken. CRC 3.1113(d). Without a Memorandum of Points and Authorities the motion is not properly set for hearing. CRC 3.1113(a). =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: GAETANI REAL ESTATE VS. MICHAEL ROTHENBERG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiff Motion To Lift Automatic Stay While Appeal Is Pending
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 4, 2024 line 5. NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO LIFT AUTOMATIC STAY WHILE APPEAL IS PENDING is DENIED without prejudice. The authority that Plaintiff provided shows an appellate court has authority to apply a recently amended statute to a matter that is currently on appeal. (City of San Jose v. International Assn. of Firefighters, Local 230 (2009) 178 Cal.App.4th 408, 424.) Plaintiff has not provided authority that a trial court that has been deprived of jurisdiction due to a perfected appeal can apply a recently amended statute. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
